extName.description: Extension name shown in the toolbar and Chrome Web Store (max 45 characters).

extDescription.message: Privacy-first bilingual web translation that keeps the original text in place so you never lose context.
extDescription.description: Chrome Web Store summary shown under the extension name (max 132 characters).

apiKeyHint.message: Paste the raw provider API key. Local OpenAI-compatible and Anthropic-compatible endpoints can leave this empty.

cacheBehaviorHint.message: Session only is the privacy-first default. Persistent stores translated text in this browser profile until cleared.

debugHint.message: Show page detection, queue, and provider error details in the popup.

displayPreviewOriginal.message: The original stays close, so reading never turns into guesswork.

displayPreviewTranslation.message: The translation sits quietly beside it, but stays easy to recognize.

endpointPresetHint.message: Presets switch the provider to OpenAI Compatible and fill the endpoint.

floatingButtonHint.message: Show a small page button that only translates after you click it.

localAnthropicEndpointHint.message: Use an Anthropic Messages API endpoint such as http://localhost:8000/v1/messages.

localJsonHint.message: Disable this if a local runtime rejects the OpenAI response_format field.

modelDefault.message: Fetch models to choose a model

modelHint.message: Fetch models from the selected provider, or keep the current provider default.

optimizeXHint.message: Translate only tweet text from X timeline cards by default.

sourceLanguageHint.message: Auto-detect is best for mixed-language webpages and timelines.

sourceSpecificHint.message: Use this only when every page you translate is mostly the same source language.

targetLanguageHint.message: Search by English name, native name, language code, or alias.

translationMarkerHint.message: Prefix translated passages with a small marker in the target language.

translateQuotedPostsHint.message: Also translate nested quoted post text inside X cards.

translateXArticlesHint.message: Translate X longform article titles and readable rich text blocks.

youtubeCaptionsHint.message: Margin currently translates existing YouTube caption tracks. If a video has no manual or auto-generated captions, speech-to-text is required before translation can work.

youtubeExistingCaptionsHint.message: Works with creator-provided captions and YouTube auto captions. These are translated by your selected translation provider.

youtubeSpeechToTextHint.message: Not available yet. Videos without YouTube captions will need an OpenAI or local speech-to-text provider before Margin can translate them.

xSkipNativeHint.message: Avoid retranslating posts that X already marks as translated.

popupReady.message: Ready to translate the current page.

popupOpenWebpage.message: Open a webpage to use Margin.

popupCannotTranslate.message: This page cannot be translated. Try a regular webpage.
